ddls:
CREATE TABLE "enrollment_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment data */,
  "ba_math" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in BA Mathematics */,
  "ba_informatica" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in BA Informatica */,
  "ba_physics_astronomy" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in BA Physics & Astronomy */,
  "ba_ai" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in BA Artificial Intelligence */,
  "ba_nl" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in BA Natural Language Processing */,
  "ba_eea" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in BA Environmental Engineering & Architecture */,
  "ba_others" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in other BA programs */,
  "bato_ma" INTEGER /* Number of students transitioning from BA to MA programs */,
  "ma_cs" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in MA Computer Science */,
  "total_enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled in all programs for a given year */,
  "average_enrollment" REAL /* Average number of students enrolled across all programs for a given year */,
  "enrollment_trend" TEXT /* Trend indicator for the enrollment numbers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of degree offered (e.g., BA, MA) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Specific admission requirements for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "department_location" TEXT /* Location of the department within the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was enrolled */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is currently enrolled in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student undergoing the transition */,
  "from_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is transitioning from */,
  "to_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is transitioning to */,
  "transition_year" INTEGER /* Year of the transition */,
  "reason_for_transition" TEXT /* Reason for the transition (e.g., academic, personal, financial) */,
  "transition_status" TEXT /* Status of the transition (e.g., approved, pending, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_to_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_from_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  "faculty_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the faculty member's expertise */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the faculty member's office */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the faculty member */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the course belongs to */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the course enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade received in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of classes attended by the student */,
  "final_project_grade" TEXT /* Final project grade (if applicable) */,
  "midterm_grade" TEXT /* Midterm grade (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email associated with the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, student) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, suspended, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., enrollment, performance, transition) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being evaluated */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment for the reported metrics */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade of students in the program */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate for the program */,
  "retention_rate" REAL /* Retention rate of students in the program */,
  "job_placement_rate" REAL /* Job placement rate of graduates from the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
